title: Are Humans Becoming Machines?  | Genesis Science Report with David Rives | S02 Ep. 21
description:
In this episode, David Rives dives deep into some of the most shocking revelations in science and technology.

Monologue: 00:01
Q&A: 11:20

We start by exposing the infamous Piltdown Man hoax, a 20th-century fraud that misled the scientific community for over 40 years. Discover the truth behind this “ape-man” and the potential cover-up by museum staff even after the fraud was exposed. Dr. Carl Werner, author of Nine Categories of Overturned Ape-Men, joins us to uncover the details.

Next, we explore a groundbreaking paleontological discovery—the identification of endogenous collagen in an Edmontosaurus fossil. Could this challenge the conventional timeline of millions of years and provide more evidence for a young Earth? Dr. Steven Taylor weighs in on this controversial find.

We also discuss the rise of Transhumanism and the potential dangers of AI. Is the growing belief in merging humans with technology leading us down a dangerous path? From Elon Musk’s warnings to controversial biohacker Bryan Johnson, we examine the ethical and moral questions surrounding AI and the quest for immortality.

Could our ambition to transcend our biological limits ultimately lead to humanity’s downfall? Don’t miss this thought-provoking episode as we reflect on the balance between innovation and ethics.

Tune in now to learn more and join the conversation!

title: Mars "Skull Hill" + Mystery of Cambrian Life | Genesis Science Report with David Rives | S02 Ep043
description:
🌌✨ Welcome to another exciting episode of the Genesis Science Report with David Rives! 
In tonight’s program, we take you on a journey that spans ancient history, modern technology, and the wonders of God’s creation. From the Tower of Babel to Artificial Intelligence, from Mars exploration to the fossil record, this episode is packed with thought-provoking insights and biblical truth. 

📖 The Tower of Babel & Artificial Intelligence Thousands of years ago, mankind came together in unity at Babel—striving to reach godlike heights without God. Today, humanity is once again building a new “tower.” But this time it’s not with bricks and clay—it’s built of code, circuits, and data. Could Artificial Intelligence be a modern parallel to the Tower of Babel? David Rives explores the striking similarities, the warnings found in Genesis 11, and why the wisdom of this world can never replace the fear of the Lord. 

🪐 Mars Mystery: “Skull Hill” A viral photograph from Mars has ignited wild theories across social media. Does it show evidence of life—or is it simply an unusual rock formation sculpted by wind? Joining us is planetary geologist Dr. Kirby Runyon, who brings his expertise to explain what the image really reveals about the Red Planet. 

🦴 The Cambrian Explosion The sudden appearance of complex life in the fossil record—the Cambrian Explosion—remains one of the greatest challenges to evolutionary theory. Researcher Paul Garner helps us understand why this event fits far better with the biblical account of creation and points us back to God’s purposeful design. 

⏳ Genesis Q&A This week’s viewer question asks: “When did time actually begin? Is time just a human construct, or does it have meaning beyond us?” David unpacks the question with biblical and scientific insights that will challenge the way you think about time itself. 

📚 Featured Resource – Starlight and Time by Dr. Russell Humphreys One of the biggest questions in biblical creation science is: If the universe is young, how can we see light from stars that are millions of light-years away? Dr. Humphreys tackles this issue with a compelling cosmological model that harmonizes Scripture with observable science. This resource is perfect for anyone seeking real, research-based answers. 

🦖 Kids Corner – The Real Velociraptor Hollywood has painted an exciting—but inaccurate—picture of the Velociraptor. In this segment, David explains what the real Velociraptor looked like, how it compares to Deinonychus, and why newer “feathered dinosaur” claims aren’t all they’re cracked up to be. It’s a fun, family-friendly way to learn about dinosaurs from a biblical worldview. 

💎 Ministry Report – New Hands-On Experience! We’re thrilled to announce the opening of our brand-new Gemstone & Fossil Mining Experience at the Wonders Center & Science Museum. This hands-on attraction lets visitors pan for gems, fossils, and even fool’s gold in a massive 65-foot mining sluice. It’s part history, part science, and part treasure hunt—an unforgettable experience for families, school groups, and creation enthusiasts alike. 

🎬 This episode is a powerful reminder that while human knowledge grows, it can never replace the wisdom of God. Whether exploring the mysteries of space, uncovering the history recorded in fossils, or addressing cutting-edge technology, we find that true understanding begins with Scripture.

Tonight’s episode is packed with science, discovery, and powerful evidence for design. We begin with one of the most dangerous and awe-inspiring regions on Earth: the Ring of Fire. title: Bacteria "Playing Dead", ISS Retirement, and Gen Z Faith | Genesis Science Report - S03, Ep10
description:
On tonight’s episode of The Genesis Science Report, we’re diving from the microscopic to the cosmic. David Rives opens the show with a fascinating look at a bacterium that can survive the ultra-sterile conditions of NASA clean rooms, almost as if it were designed to endure the impossible. What does this tiny survivor reveal about the resilience of life, the challenges of planetary protection, and the deeper evidence of design woven into creation?

Then we head into orbit as astronaut Colonel Jeff Williams joins us to talk about the uncertain future of the International Space Station. After more than two decades in space, is the ISS truly nearing its final chapter, or is there still more work to be done? Jeff brings firsthand insight into the station’s value, condition, and what could be at stake as Congress debates its future.

Later, Brian Young joins us for a timely conversation about Generation Z, cultural pressure, and why more young people may be rethinking what they’ve been told about truth, identity, and faith. In a world full of noise and skepticism, could this generation be more open to lasting answers than many expect?

It’s a thought-provoking episode filled with science, culture, big questions, and a reminder that even the smallest details of creation can point to something greater.

description:
On this episode of The Genesis Science Report, David Rives takes us from the breathtaking storms of Saturn to the rugged heights of the Rocky Mountains.

Living high above the tree line in freezing temperatures, thin air, and steep cliffside terrain, these animals are equipped with specialized insulation, strong hooves, and climbing ability that point to purposeful design in creation.

From the planets above to the mountains below, creation is filled with evidence of order, beauty, and design.

title: Is Evolution Still Science? Soil Science Rewrites the Timeline | Genesis Science Report - S03, Ep13
description:
What if the ground beneath us is more connected, more complex, and more unstable than scientists once believed?

On this episode of The Genesis Science Report, David Rives looks at new research from the West Coast suggesting that the Cascadia subduction zone and the San Andreas Fault may be more closely linked than previous models assumed. Tiny earthquake swarms near the Mendocino Triple Junction are giving researchers a new look at hidden plate fragments, shifting fault systems, and the possibility of large-scale seismic interaction.
From a biblical perspective, these discoveries remind us that the earth is not a static machine, but a powerful and dynamic creation under the sustaining hand of God.

Later in the episode, we examine whether evolutionary theory has moved outside the bounds of testable science and into philosophical assumptions, and we take a closer look at soil dynamics, erosion, and how quickly landscapes can change over time.

Watch The Genesis Science Report for news, science, and faith from a biblical worldview.

description:

On this episode of the Genesis Science Report, David Rives explores fascinating new research revealing hidden “synapse hotspots” in the teenage brain — powerful regions linked to creativity, learning, and social connection. Far from being a flawed stage of development, adolescence may actually showcase incredible precision and purpose in human design.

title: The Smithsonian's Missing Evidence & UFOs Explained | Genesis Science Report - S03, Ep15
description:
🌌 Welcome to the Genesis Science Report! 🌌

Join host David Rives as we dive into the intriguing world of biblical archaeology and the latest discoveries that are reshaping our understanding of history. In tonight's episode, we're thrilled to have Dr. Carl Werner back to discuss the fossil record and its implications on our long-held beliefs.

But first, we’ll take you to ancient Jerusalem for a groundbreaking find! 🎉 Just a few months ago, archaeologists uncovered a small yet powerful artifact—a 2700-year-old Assyrian tax notice near the Temple Mount! This tiny pottery fragment, inscribed with cuneiform writing, is not just a historical curiosity; it's the very first written evidence of the Assyrian Empire’s relationship with the Kingdom of Judah. 🏺🏛️

What does this discovery mean for our understanding of biblical texts? How does it align with the accounts of King Hezekiah’s struggles with Assyria? Tune in as we unravel the significance of this unparalleled find and how it confirms biblical narratives like never before.

And if you thought taxes were mundane, think again! This artifact is a testament to the intricate dynamics between ancient superpowers and the bureaucratic intricacies that echo through time.

Stay with us as we also explore the captivating subject of UFOs and unidentified aerial phenomena later in the show. What claims and evidence are emerging, and what do they mean for us today?

Don’t miss this enlightening episode packed with insights, discoveries, and the truth behind ancient stories! Hit that subscribe button and join the conversation! 🔍✨

title: From Coral Reefs to Cosmic Clues: Design at Every Scale | Genesis Science Report - with David Rives
description:
🌍🔬 Welcome to the Genesis Science Report!

From the microscopic world of proteins to the vast ecosystems of the Great Barrier Reef, this episode explores the fascinating intersection of science, history, and faith.

🧬 Proteins: The Building Blocks of Life
Host David Rives begins by exploring the incredible complexity of proteins. These tiny molecules power nearly every process in the body—from repairing tissues to transporting oxygen.

A recent scientific discovery highlights how proteins help keep chromosomes connected during egg and sperm development. This process is essential for healthy fertility and proper genetic inheritance.

🌊 What’s Really Happening to the Great Barrier Reef?
Next, we travel to Australia to look at the Great Barrier Reef.

Despite years of alarming headlines about coral bleaching, new observations suggest the reef may be more resilient than many reports claim.

Researcher John McKay joins the program to share firsthand insights into coral growth, reef recovery, and the natural cycles affecting coral ecosystems.

🏛️ History, Exploration, and the Boomerang
The discussion also explores history—from Captain Cook’s 1770 voyage to the surprising origins of the word Boomerang.

These cultural and historical connections reveal fascinating links between exploration, anthropology, and scientific discovery.

✨ In this episode you’ll discover:
• Why proteins are essential to life
• What new research reveals about genetics
• How coral reefs can recover faster than expected
• The historical story behind the boomerang and early Australian exploration
